couple_faq_items.q: Can I upload two separate photos?
couple_faq_items.a: Yes. Upload a photo of each person and add a note describing how you want them posed together. The AI will combine both likenesses into one couple chibi scene.

couple_faq_items.q: Will both characters look consistent in style?
couple_faq_items.a: Yes. Both characters are generated together in the same image, ensuring consistent art style, proportions, and color harmony.

couple_faq_items.q: Can I make same-sex couple art?
couple_faq_items.a: Of course. Describe any combination of characters and the AI will create beautiful couple art regardless of gender.

couple_faq_items.q: Can I use this for a wedding invitation?
couple_faq_items.a: Absolutely. Many users create chibi couple art for wedding stationery. Select Portrait Chibi style for a slightly more detailed look that works great in print.

couple.hero_badge: Anime Couple Chibi · Matching Avatars & Cute Pair Art
couple.title: Chibi Couple Generator
couple.hero_subtitle: Create adorable chibi couple art from text descriptions or reference photos. Generate matching anime-style couple avatars, cute pair illustrations, and romantic chibi scenes — perfect for anniversaries, social media, or just because.
couple.prompt_placeholder: Boy: black hair, blue jacket. Girl: blonde hair, red dress. Holding hands under cherry blossoms.
couple.prompt_default: A cute chibi couple wearing matching outfits, holding hands, romantic pastel background, warm happy expressions
couple.photo_help: Upload a couple photo or describe both characters clearly.
couple.style_help: Kawaii Soft works well for romantic couple scenes.
couple.result_desc: Download your romantic chibi couple image and share it anywhere.
couple.step1_body: Tell the AI about both characters: appearance, outfits, poses, and the vibe you want.
couple.step2_body: Upload photos of you and your partner for a chibi transformation that keeps both likenesses.
couple.step3_body: Classic Chibi for bold anime look, Kawaii Soft for gentle pastel romance, or Portrait Chibi for more detailed faces.
couple.step4_body: Download your couple chibi art and share it everywhere.
couple.tip1_body: Give details for each person separately.
couple.tip2_body: "Holding hands," "back to back," or "sharing an umbrella" gives the AI a clear composition.
couple.tip3_body: Chibi art works best with straightforward, cute poses rather than complex action scenes.
